## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content performance, SEO strategies, and ongoing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site performance is improving significantly: 627 more clicks, 123k+ more impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [GrowthX content showing promising early results: 25 clicks last week, up from 2](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [AI-focused content (integration, assessments, feedback) performing well, indicating educator interest](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Need to identify high-potential tools to ungate for improved SEO visibility](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO Progress

  - [Overall site metrics improving rapidly:](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [627 more clicks, 123k+ more impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [Impressions graph shows steep upward trend](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [GrowthX content specifically:](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [Dramatic jump from 2 to 25 clicks in a week](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
      - [\~10 pieces of content driving this growth](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Content indexing quickly, unusual for new blog content](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Homepage saw unexplained traffic spike \~6 weeks ago (potential PR/outreach event?)](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

### Content Linking and Quality Control

  - [Spaces links often inappropriate for teacher-facing content](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [Nikki manually adjusting to ensure relevance](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Dea to focus on link appropriateness during reviews](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Research stat links frequently broken or inaccessible](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Known issue across accounts, dev team working on fix](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Dea to pay extra attention to stat link validity](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Performance Analysis Tools

  - [GSC Performance Report:](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [Allows granular analysis by content category, individual pages](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [Useful for identifying top-performing content and queries](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [New SchoolAI Landing Pages Dashboard:](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [Shows top 20 ranking blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [Tracks daily/weekly performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
      - [Will help inform content refresh strategy in the future](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Top Performing Content Categories

1.  AI Integration
2.  AI-driven Assessments and Feedback

  - [Encouraging sign given initial concerns about educator AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Indicates strong search interest in these topics](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

### Product Updates and SEO Strategy

  - [New product actively being built](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Potential to ungate select tools for improved SEO visibility](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [Alicia (product leader) open to this approach](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [Dave to identify highest potential tools to ungate](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to provide recommendations on which tools to ungate for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Nikki to follow up with Alicia on ungating strategy](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Dea to send total articles for the week and new topics for review](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring performance, especially AI-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Explore content refresh opportunities as data accumulates in new dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/En9rDq62erR_a8yxAXsxRPfCLnsebc8z?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
